sources.sql: 'SELECT dh_sbti_companies.country AS dh_sbti_companies_country, count(dh_sbti_companies.id) AS companies, sum(CASE WHEN (dh_sbti_companies.net_zero_committed = true) THEN %(param_1)s ELSE %(param_2)s END) AS net_zero FROM dh_sbti_companies GROUP BY dh_sbti_companies.country ORDER BY count(dh_sbti_companies.id) DESC'

'SELECT dh_sbti_companies.sector AS dh_sbti_companies_sector, count(dh_sbti_companies.id) AS companies, sum(CASE WHEN (dh_sbti_companies.near_term_ambition ILIKE %(near_term_ambition_1)s) THEN %(param_1)s ELSE %(param_2)s END) AS count_1_5c, sum(CASE WHEN (dh_sbti_companies.net_zero_committed = true) THEN %(param_3)s ELSE %(param_4)s END) AS net_zero FROM dh_sbti_companies GROUP BY dh_sbti_compan…
'SELECT count(dh_sbti_companies.id) AS count_1 FROM dh_sbti_companies'
'SELECT count(dh_sbti_companies.id) AS count_1 FROM dh_sbti_companies WHERE lower(dh_sbti_companies.target_status) = %(lower_1)s'
'SELECT count(dh_sbti_companies.id) AS count_1 FROM dh_sbti_companies WHERE lower(dh_sbti_companies.target_status) = %(lower_1)s'
'SELECT count(dh_sbti_companies.id) AS count_1 FROM dh_sbti_companies WHERE dh_sbti_companies.net_zero_committed = true'
'SELECT count(dh_sbti_companies.id) AS count_1 FROM dh_sbti_companies WHERE dh_sbti_companies.near_term_ambition ILIKE %(near_term_ambition_1)s'
'SELECT count(DISTINCT dh_sbti_companies.sector) AS count_1 FROM dh_sbti_companies'
'SELECT count(DISTINCT dh_sbti_companies.country) AS count_1 FROM dh_sbti_companies'
'SELECT count(dh_ngfs_scenario_data.id) AS count_1 FROM dh_ngfs_scenario_data'
'SELECT count(DISTINCT dh_ngfs_scenario_data.scenario) AS count_1 FROM dh_ngfs_scenario_data'
'SELECT count(DISTINCT dh_ngfs_scenario_data.variable) AS count_1 FROM dh_ngfs_scenario_data'
'SELECT count(dh_sbti_companies.id) AS count_1 FROM dh_sbti_companies'
'SELECT count(DISTINCT dh_sbti_companies.sector) AS count_1 FROM dh_sbti_companies'
